dismissalText.commentary: Jacob Bethell b Harpreet Brar 11 (7b 2x4 0x6 12m) SR: 157.14

dismissalComment.html: Chopped on, and Brar is absolutely pumped! His teammates swarm him, and why not. He pushed it just fuller, 96.3 kph and moved back into Bethell once more. He's cramped into the cut, because it spins back in more than he expected, and certainly quicker than he expected. Edged back into the stumps

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli c Arya b Chahal 58 (37b 4x4 3x6 68m) SR: 156.75

dismissalComment.html: Chahal has gone for runs but he gets a big, big wicket here. Full on leg and Kohli wants to take him on with the flick. Doesn't get it out of the middle and it goes straight to Priyansh Arya at deep midwicket

dismissalText.commentary: Devdutt Padikkal c Iyer b Harpreet Brar 45 (25b 4x4 3x6 33m) SR: 180

dismissalComment.html: Harpreet Brar, what a comeback into this side! Just smart spin bowling, really. Back of a length outside off, grips off the pitch at 95.7 kph. DDP too early into this cut and he bunts it right into cover's hands. DDP departs five short of his half-century

dismissalText.long: c Harpreet Brar b Arshdeep Singh
dismissalText.commentary: Tim David c Harpreet Brar b Arshdeep Singh 28 (12b 2x4 2x6 30m) SR: 233.33

dismissalComment.html: David picks the fielder and RCB finish on 222. But wait, Tim David has reviewed this for height! It's a full toss that David tries to flick away over square leg. One hand comes off the bat and the ball doesn't carry beyond the fielder. The check confirms it was a fair delivery and RCB do finish on 222

dismissalText.commentary: Marcus Stoinis lbw b Hazlewood 37 (25b 5x4 0x6 46m) SR: 148

dismissalComment.html: Oh boy what a way to get out at this stage! Stoinis misses a juicy full toss as he looks to whip it away. Hit plumb in front and the finger goes up immediately. Stoinis reviews it. No bat, confirmed by UltraEdge, and it's umpire's call on wickets with the ball projected to be just clipping leg stump. PBKS had built up great momentum over the last three overs, but this disrupts that. Hazlewood doing the damage, although this time not quite with a delivery he'd have thought would have done the trick

dismissalText.commentary: Marcus Stoinis lbw b Hazlewood 37 (25b 5x4 0x6 46m) SR: 148

dismissalComment.html: Oh boy what a way to get out at this stage! Stoinis misses a juicy full toss as he looks to whip it away. Hit plumb in front and the finger goes up immediately. Stoinis reviews it. No bat, confirmed by UltraEdge, and it's umpire's call on wickets with the ball projected to be just clipping leg stump. PBKS had built up great momentum over the last three overs, but this disrupts that. Hazlewood doing the damage, although this time not quite with a delivery he'd have thought would have done the trick

dismissalText.commentary: Azmatullah Omarzai c David b Rasikh Salam 14 (10b 1x4 1x6 22m) SR: 140

dismissalComment.html: Slower ball outside off, miscued to long-off and RCB become the first team to reach the playoffs in IPL 2026. A stellar batting display followed up by a stellar bowling show after losing the toss, and it's scenes of joy for the defending champions. PBKS, the losing finalists last year, slide to their sixth consecutive defeat, and are staring now at the very real probability of missing out on making the playoffs
